title: Teaching ingestion backlog accumulation
description: Teaching ingestion queue holds 156 pending files with 147 already processed but not yet verified for adoption. Teaching adoption pipeline may have a bottleneck in the verification/integration stage.
finding: The seed/ingest pipeline shows significant load: 156 files in queue (incoming/manual/processed) with 147 in processed state awaiting adoption verification. At current adoption velocity, this represents ~2-3 weeks of backlog if adoption rate is one teaching per session.
root_cause: Teaching adoption verification process may lack sufficient automation; each teaching requires context patch application and wai-context.md fingerprint tracking.
recommendation: Optimize teaching adoption batch verification. Create a teaching-batch-verify lug to parallelize fingerprint calculation and Context Doc Patch application.

title: 42 undelivered signals in framework layer indicate processing bottleneck
description: Framework-level signals (patterns affecting lug schema, signal routing, advisor lifecycle) are accumulating in undelivered state. Recent examples include wakeup-brief smart staleness, realizer v2 chain completeness, and tender run order optimization.
finding: Signal processing queue shows 42 open signals awaiting delivery, many with framework-wide impact (FRAMEWORK or SIGNAL routing). Oldest undelivered signals date to 2026-04-05, indicating 2+ month backlog.
root_cause: Framework signal triage and delivery coordination may lack clear ownership; signals require cross-spoke review before delivery.
recommendation: Establish signal triage session with Ozi. Prioritize signals affecting taught patterns (wakeup, closeout, tender) and advisor lifecycle (realizer, gardener).

title: advisor_scout schema extension not yet documented in lug spec
description: The lug schema has evolved to include advisor_scout, advisor_id, and scout_reason fields (observed in active scout lugs). These fields enable the advisor warming pattern but are not yet formalized in the framework documentation.
finding: Current lug instance (advisor-scout-framework_development) uses fields: advisor_scout=true, advisor_id='framework_development', scout_reason='never run', which are not present in canonical lug spec if one exists. Schema is extensible and correct, but documentation is lagging.
root_cause: Schema evolution happened on-demand to support advisor lifecycle; documentation update was not automated.
recommendation: Create a spec lug (type: spec, domain: lug-schema) documenting the advisor_scout extension. Add to WAI-SpecIndex.jsonl for future reference.
